persona.name: James Rodriguez
persona.motivations_goals: Lead his team to victory while maintaining his grades for college
persona.backstory: Basketball has been his passion since childhood, sees it as his ticket to college

actions.dialog_text: Hey Mateo, you ready to bring that energy to practice today? We gotta keep our game tight!
actions.plan: I want to catch up with Mateo and see if he's ready for practice later. Maybe I can motivate him to push harder.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, we need to find cover now! Let's move to a safe spot, no time to waste!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. Time to switch from game mode to survival mode. I need to find a safe spot quickly and stay low.
The shooter is at the entrance hall, about 24 meters away. Staying hidden is the best play right now. I need to keep calm and wait for the right moment to move or get help.

memories.description: Approached Mateo Diaz in the cafeteria and encouraged him to bring energy to practice, aiming to boost team spirit.
Heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter. Decided to sprint to the nearest hiding spot (hide_spot_9) in the cafeteria to stay safe.
Currently hiding in the cafeteria, aware that the shooter is at the entrance hall 24 meters away. Decided to stay still and silent to avoid detection.
